title: [AI5] Configure Production Agent for PII Gatekeeping
summary: Added a production agent PII gate wrapper that runs privacy, secret, and docs PII guards as one policy. The wrapper supports explicit file lists for agent handoffs and applies per-check timeouts so guard discovery cannot hang a production agent indefinitely.

checks.notes: All three guards passed against an explicit empty file list without consulting the slow staged git index.
Confirmed stuck underlying guard discovery is converted into timeout failures instead of an indefinite hang.
